title: pyrus zhijiangensis
intro: Pyrus zhijiangensis, also known as the Zhijiang pear, is a species of pear tree native to China, belonging to the family Rosaceae. The bark and fruit of the Pyrus zhijiangensis are used in traditional Chinese medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Pyrus zhijiangensis have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating sore throats, and improving digestion. It is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
